changesets.$note: Argus packages are private apps, not published npm libraries — no changeset ledger.

boundary.$note: The lockfile is pnpm-managed; legitimate dependency additions regenerate it. Allowed so normal dep changes don't trip boundary-guard.

rules.$note: Correlation is shared by SPEC_01 (scoring core) and SPEC_02 (identity + unexplained productisation) — touching either spec satisfies the rule.
